base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending_village_sunrise — a ui from 1986 castlevania. Village sunrise after Dracula defeat — orange-red sky over rooftops and castle ruins. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Village sunrise after Dracula defeat — orange-red sky over rooftops and castle ruins; closes game
